query_title: Exploits of a Young Don Juan

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character
recommendations.overview: After another spat with her kids, Dona Hermínia decides to take some time off from them and hides away in her aunt's house, where she reminisces about her kids in an age when they still needed her.

recommendations.title: One Piece: Stampede
recommendations.overview: The world's boldest buccaneers set sail for the great Pirate Festival, where the Straw Hats join a mad-dash race to find Gol D. Roger's treasure. There's just one little problem: An old member of Roger's crew has a sinister score to settle.

recommendations.title: I Am Not an Easy Man
recommendations.overview: The chauvinist Damien wakes up in a world where women and men have their roles reversed in society, and everything is dominated by women.

recommendations.title: Like Stars on Earth
recommendations.overview: Ishaan Awasthi is an eight-year-old whose world is filled with wonders that no one else seems to appreciate. Colours, fish, dogs, and kites don't seem important to the adults, who are much more interested in things like homework, marks, and neatness.

recommendations.title: ExTerminators
recommendations.overview: Three women from a rage-therapy group band together to dole out justice to the men who wronged them.

recommendations.title: Who Framed Roger Rabbit
recommendations.overview: 'Toon star Roger is worried that his wife Jessica is playing pattycake with someone else, so the studio hires detective Eddie Valiant to snoop on her. But the stakes are quickly raised when Marvin Acme is found dead and Roger is the prime suspect.

recommendations.title: Angels in the Outfield

recommendations.title: Greenberg
recommendations.overview: Roger Greenberg, a failed musician now making a living as a carpenter in New York, returns to Los Angeles to house-sit for his brother. He's stranded there—since he doesn't drive—until his brother's assistant, Florence, comes to his rescue. She's as

recommendations.title: Wild Child

recommendations.title: MILF
